data.name: Dissolve Into Me
data.detailed_description:
Experience a world of dark fantasy and forbidden desires in Dissolve Into Me, a steamy adult visual novel. Get ready for an unforgettable journey filled with intense encounters, complex characters, and sensual exploration.

You are a seasoned mercenary, a sellsword whose life is governed by steel and survival. But when a chance encounter in a goblin-infested cave presents you with an impossible choice, your life takes a sharp turn down a path of temptation and intrigue. Your encounters will challenge your morals, your wallet, and your deepest cravings.

Experience a narrative where every interaction drips with tension and every relationship could unlock new depths of pleasure. 🗡️ Form a unique bond with Nireia, a captivating slime woman whose mysterious nature and eager curiosity lead to increasingly intimate and creative encounters. From tense negotiations in filthy cages to passionate nights under the stars, the chemistry between you will blur the lines between professional duty and personal passion. 💎

Key Features:

  • A Gripping, Linear Narrative: Immerse yourself in a compelling story of freedom, greed, and connection. The path is set, but the sensations you'll experience are entirely new.

  • Vivid, Erotic Encounters: The story doesn't shy away from explicit, detailed scenes of intimacy. Explore a variety of sensual situations as your relationship with Nireia evolves in unexpected ways. 💖

  • An Unforgettable Companion: Meet Nireia, a slime-born woman whose unique physiology and insatiable curiosity lead to unforgettable moments. 🥵

  • A Unique Heroine: Nireia is not a typical love interest. Her playful, inquisitive nature and magical form allow for uniquely creative and intensely pleasurable experiences.

  • Rich, Atmospheric Worldbuilding: From stinking goblin caves to rustic taverns and opulent manor houses, every scene is painted with descriptive prose that pulls you deeper into the world.

  • A Mercenary's Morality: Navigate a world where gold often trumps goodwill, but some connections might just be priceless.

A Tale of Two Souls

This is more than a simple treasure hunt. It's the story of two outsiders finding something real in a world that rejects them. The journey is as much about internal discovery as it is about external reward.

Prepare to lose yourself in a story of passion, danger, and the thrilling unknown. Your next great adventure—and your most intimate connection—awaits. 🎭

data.short_description: A mercenary rescues a slime woman from goblins. Their pragmatic partnership for treasure hunting becomes an unbreakable bond in this darkly humorous adult visual novel with explicit scenes and deep character development.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

Minimum:

  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
